name: google-workspace-mcp
description: Comprehensive control over Google Workspace services through natural language (Gmail, Drive, Calendar, Docs, Sheets, Slides, Forms, Tasks, Contacts, Chat, and Apps Script).

settings.name: Google OAuth Client ID
settings.description: Your Google OAuth client ID from Google Cloud Console.

settings.name: Google OAuth Client Secret
settings.description: Your Google OAuth client secret from Google Cloud Console.

settings.name: Google PSE API Key
settings.description: API key for Google Programmable Search Engine.

settings.name: Google PSE Engine ID
settings.description: Engine ID for Google Programmable Search Engine.

settings.name: OAuth Insecure Transport
settings.description: Allow OAuth over HTTP for development (enable for development only). Set to 1 to enable.
